posts.author: ivgii (IVGI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
First time posting here.
I started to use Monday last week,
I created few boards, for my team, all the boards are located under specific folder
I can’t find a way to share the folder
It will be easier than share each board.
Thank you
ivgi

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @ivgii - welcome to the monday.com community an extension of the monday.com family!

At this time you can’t share a folder with your team, the will automatically see the folders once added to a board.

Can you tell us more about your use case here?
Are these boards Private or Shareable boards that you are looking to add multiple team members at once?

P.S. If the boards are main - all team members will automatically see them and have access to them.
